title: Playground Operations Ledger
concept: A diagnostics-first Playground redesign for power users managing many saved sites. The first viewport is an operations ledger that leads with health, logs, database details, storage status, and current-site consequences before exposing creation, saving, Site Manager, import/export, and Blueprint catalog tasks.
focus: diagnostics and logs console as the first viewport
operations ledger instead of a generic three-pane console
monochrome interface with colored status chips
saved Playground management for power users
flows: Monitor active Playground health, logs, database details, save state, path navigation, Homepage, WP Admin, and embedded WordPress preview from the first screen
Start a Playground from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or imported .zip with route-specific inputs and consequences
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with visible progress, destination-specific requirements, and resulting saved identity
Browse saved and unsaved Playgrounds, then open, rename, delete, or save entries with delete consequences visible
Use Site Manager surfaces for runtime settings, destructive reset/reload, file browsing, Blueprint editing, database tools, and logs
Move artifacts through GitHub export, zip download, zip import, Blueprint link copy, Blueprint bundle download, Blueprint run, and database.sqlite download
Browse, search, filter, inspect, and run Blueprint gallery entries from a catalog that represents the full 43 item gallery
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
